assertions.title: Request changes returns to submitter

steps.action: As VP approver, open request 69e2bbf986cb481557031b45 and click Request Changes with comment.
steps.observed: Status changed to Changes Requested and request moved to Changes Requested tab.

steps.action: Login as submitter (manager) and attempt to edit/resubmit the changes-requested request.
steps.expected: Submitter can edit and resubmit; chain restarts at step 1.
steps.observed: Submitter only had View action; detail modal showed no Edit/Resubmit controls, so resubmission could not be performed from UI.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2bbf986cb481557031b45/request-changes -> 200; GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2bbf986cb481557031b45 -> status=changes_requested, audit includes request_changes; no UI path triggered POST /resubmit.

assertions.issues: Submitter edit/resubmit UX is not exposed in the tested UI path.

assertions.title: Notifications for approval events

steps.expected: Next approver receives notification and badge updates in real time.
steps.observed: Next approver visibility worked through Approvals sidebar/queue badges (Finance then CHRO showed Approvals 1 / My queue 1).

steps.action: Trigger rejection on 69e2bc4086cb481557031b96 and use existing changes-requested event on 69e2bbf986cb481557031b45; then check submitter notifications.
steps.expected: Submitter receives explicit notifications for final approval, rejection, and changes requested with notification badge updates.
steps.observed: Submitter saw status counters updated (Approved 1, Rejected 1, Changes Requested 1), but no bell feed content or bell badge count was surfaced when opening Notifications.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2bbf986cb481557031b4b/approve -> 200 (VP), -> 200 (Finance), -> 200 (CHRO) with final status=approved; POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2bc4086cb481557031b96/reject -> 200 with status=rejected; GET requests confirmed approved/rejected/changes_requested outcomes.

assertions.issues: Contract-specified notification bell content/badge updates were not present; only approvals queue/status counters reflected events.

assertions.title: Self-approval prevention

steps.action: Login as VP submitter and inspect own pending request 69e2bbfa86cb481557031b51 in Approvals.
steps.expected: Approve button is disabled with tooltip "You cannot approve your own request."
steps.observed: Own request appeared as View-only row (disabled selection + View action); no disabled Approve button and no tooltip text were rendered.

steps.action: Attempt self-approve via API as the submitter.
steps.observed: API returned 403 with error "You cannot act on your own request."

evidence.network: GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2bbfa86cb481557031b51 -> status=pending at step 0; POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2bbfa86cb481557031b51/approve as submitter -> 403 (You cannot act on your own request).

assertions.issues: UI did not present the required disabled Approve control with tooltip copy from the assertion.

summary: Tested 3 assigned assertions: 0 passed, 3 failed (VAL-APPROVAL-009, VAL-APPROVAL-010, VAL-APPROVAL-013).
